brief_en: OpenAI ships Agent SDK 1.0; open-source tool-use benchmarks refresh
brief_zh: OpenAI 推出 Agent SDK 1.0，开源工具调用基准更新
headline_en: OpenAI ships Agent SDK 1.0; open-source tool-use benchmarks refresh
headline_zh: OpenAI 推出 Agent SDK 1.0，开源工具调用基准更新
lede_en: Twenty-two items today. OpenAI shipped Agent SDK 1.0 with persistent sessions and workflow primitives; the open-source community is digesting a new BFCL benchmark release.
lede_zh: 今日共采集 22 项内容。OpenAI 正式发布 Agent SDK 1.0，引入持久会话与工作流编排原语；开源社区围绕新版 BFCL 基准更新讨论激烈。
